rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The rule text governs temporary educator certification and contains no tax, property, or homestead provisions.
quote:
The board shall:
(1) establish a temporary certificate for educators certified by other states; and
(2) immediately issue a certificate described by Subdivision (1) to a person who applies for a certificate issued under Section 21.052.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and educator certification statute.
